_comment: Moon-rock CHECK candidates, sourced from the Kgamer77/SuperMarioOdysseyArchipelago
(MIT) per-kingdom loc_*_Postgame tables — the same community lineage cited in
CLAUDE.md. These tables mix true moon-rock moons with post-GAME-only moons
(Koopa Freerunning cups, Peach visits, hint-art, Hat-and-Seek, ...). The split
is decided by scripts/audit_moon_rock_locations.py against the local romfs
IsMoonRock flag — the flag data itself stays on the user's machine.
Names converted to this apworld's '<Kingdom>: <Name>' convention verbatim;
casing drift vs MSBT is reported by the audit for one-at-a-time correction.
